prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that validate SASL mechanism configuration at broker startup: the sasl.enabled.mechanisms validation, the JAAS config presence check, and the mechanism-specific configuration validation (SCRAM, GSSAPI, OAUTHBEARER).
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that validate SASL mechanism configuration at broker startup: the sasl.enabled.mechanisms validation, the JAAS config presence check, and the mechanism-specific configuration validation (SCRAM, GSSAPI, OAUTHBEARER).
